title: Venezuelan Beef Stew
description: A hearty and flavorful stew originating from Venezuela, made with tender beef and a blend of aromatic spices.

ingredients.name: Venezuelan beef
ingredients.notes: such as pabellón or skirt steak

ingredients.name: Bitter
ingredients.notes: Venezuelan bitter chocolate or bitter cocoa powder

instructions: Season the beef with salt and black pepper.
Heat a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the beef and cook until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Add the stew and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 2-1/2 hours, or until the beef is tender.
Stir in the bitter and continue to simmer for an additional 10 minutes.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh cilantro or scallions.
